tweets.topic: Reliance Jio Rs 500 Plan Bundles YouTube Premium and Gemini AI Pro
tweets.tweet: Reliance Jio's new ₹500 plan now bundles YouTube Premium and Google Gemini AI Pro for 3 months. Finally getting some real value in mid-range plans—your streaming and AI assistant just became besties! #JioUpdate #TechNews

tweets.topic: Bharti Airtel Hikes Prepaid Plan Prices by ₹30 with 5G Benefits
tweets.tweet: Bharti Airtel just hiked prepaid plans by ₹30, but you're getting 5G access across all price points now. So basically, you're paying a bit extra but your Instagram Reels will load at light speed! #Airtel5G #IndianTelecom

tweets.topic: Vivo T5 Pro 5G Launched with 9020mAh Battery and Sony Camera
tweets.tweet: Vivo T5 Pro 5G launched with a massive 9020mAh battery and Sony IMX882 camera at ₹20,999. Finally, a phone that won't die by evening and actually clicks decent photos without breaking the bank! #VivoT5Pro #5GPhones

tweets.topic: Huawei Launches World's First Horizontally Wide Foldable Phone
tweets.tweet: Huawei just dropped the world's first horizontal foldable phone with a massive screen that unfolds like a tablet—think bigger than anything Samsung or Apple has.

tweets.topic: Operation Octopus 2.0: 52 Arrested in Pan-India Cyber Fraud Including 32 Bank Officials
tweets.tweet: Operation Octopus 2.0 just netted 52 people across India, including 32 bank officials, in a massive cyber fraud bust—turns out your friendly neighborhood banker might've had a side hustle.

tweets.topic: SIM Box Racket Busted at Hyderabad Airport with 198 Pre-Activated Cards
tweets.tweet: Hyderabad Airport customs busted a SIM box racket with 198 pre-activated cards worth ₹5+ lakhs—basically a scammer's dream setup caught red-handed. Good news for us: fewer spam calls and fraud attempts heading our way! #Cybersecurity #IndiaFirst

tweets.topic: Google Pay Launches Pocket Money Feature
tweets.tweet: Google Pay just rolled out a Pocket Money feature letting parents set up ₹500-₹5,000 monthly allowances for kids with supervised digital wallets. Finally, teaching youngsters about money management without them raiding your actual bank account! #GooglePay #FinTech

tweets.topic: RBI Proposes 1-Hour Pause for High-Value UPI Payments
tweets.tweet: RBI just proposed a 1-hour pause for UPI payments above ₹5 lakh to prevent fraud and unauthorized transfers. Good news for your peace of mind—gives you time to double-check before large money leaves your account. #UPI #FinancialSafety

tweets.topic: GeForce NOW Cloud Gaming Service Now Available in India at Rs 999
tweets.tweet: NVIDIA's GeForce NOW just landed in India at ₹999/month, letting you play AAA games without dropping ₹2 lakhs on a beast PC. Finally, your old laptop can stop sweating during those gaming sessions. #GeForceNOW #IndianGaming

tweets.topic: Critical Software Security Updates: Why You Shouldn't Ignore Them
tweets.tweet: Your apps just dropped critical security patches today—ignoring them is like leaving your door unlocked while traveling. Update everything now because hackers literally hunt for people skipping these fixes, and it takes 2 minutes vs. losing ₹50,000+ to fraud.
